lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਮਾਸ ਪੁਰੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਖੁ ਮਸੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: saahib ke gun naanak gaavai maas puree vich aakh masolaa |
lines.english: Nanak sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord and Master in the city of corpses, and voices this account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੂਨ ਕੇ ਸੋਹਿਲੇ ਗਾਵੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਤੁ ਕਾ ਕੁੰਗੂ ਪਾਇ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khoon ke sohile gaaveeeh naanak rat kaa kungoo paae ve laalo |1|
lines.english: The wedding songs of murder are sung, O Nanak, and blood is sprinkled instead of saffron, O Lalo. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੁ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਸਚੜਾ ਨਿਆਉ ਕਰੇਗੁ ਮਸੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa so saahib sach tapaavas sacharraa niaau kareg masolaa |
lines.english: The Lord and Master is True, and True is His justice. He issues His Commands according to His judgement.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਵਾਈ ਬੈਠਾ ਵੇਖੈ ਵਖਿ ਇਕੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin upaaee rang ravaaee baitthaa vekhai vakh ikelaa |
lines.english: The One who created, and attached the mortals to pleasures, sits alone, and watches this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਪੜੁ ਟੁਕੁ ਟੁਕੁ ਹੋਸੀ ਹਿਦੁਸਤਾਨੁ ਸਮਾਲਸੀ ਬੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kaparr ttuk ttuk hosee hidusataan samaalasee bolaa |
lines.english: The body-fabric will be torn apart into shreds, and then India will remember these words.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਸੀ ਸਚ ਕੀ ਬੇਲਾ ॥੨॥੩॥੫॥
lines.translit: sach kee baanee naanak aakhai sach sunaaeisee sach kee belaa |2|3|5|
lines.english: Nanak speaks the Word of Truth; he proclaims the Truth at this, the right time. ||2||3||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਨਿ ਅਠਤਰੈ ਜਾਨਿ ਸਤਾਨਵੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਭੀ ਉਠਸੀ ਮਰਦ ਕਾ ਚੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: aavan atthatarai jaan sataanavai hor bhee utthasee marad kaa chelaa |
lines.english: Coming in seventy-eight (1521 A.D.), they will depart in ninety-seven (1540 A.D.), and then another disciple of man will rise up.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਆਏ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਖਸਮਾਹੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਭ ਵਰਤਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aae hukam khasamaahu hukam sabh varatanee |
lines.english: Everyone comes by Command of the Lord and Master. The Hukam of His Command extends to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਲਾਹਿਹੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: saalaahihu sach sabh aoopar har dhanee |
lines.english: So praise the True Lord; the Lord is the Master over all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਸਭੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach saahib saachaa khel sabh har dhanee |1|
lines.english: True is the Lord and Master, and True is His play. The Lord is the Master of all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ਸਰੀਕੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਲੇਖੈ ਹਉ ਗਨੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis naahee koe sareek kis lekhai hau ganee | rahaau |
lines.english: No one is equal to Him; am I of any account? ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਣ ਪਾਣੀ ਧਰਤੀ ਆਕਾਸੁ ਘਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਹਰਿ ਬਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: paun paanee dharatee aakaas ghar mandar har banee |
lines.english: Air, water, earth and sky - the Lord has made these His home and temple.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਝੂਠੁ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਗਨੀ ॥੨॥੧॥
lines.translit: vich varatai naanak aap jhootth kahu kiaa ganee |2|1|
lines.english: He Himself is pervading everywhere, O Nanak. Tell me: what can be counted as false? ||2||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਨਿਹਫਲ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ਬਫਾਵੈ ਦੁਰਮਤੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: nit nihafal karam kamaae bafaavai duramateea |
lines.english: The evil-minded person continually does fruitless deeds, all puffed up with pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਬਾਜੀ ਸੈਸਾਰੁ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa baajee saisaar na chetai har naamaa |
lines.english: Such is the drama of the world, that he does not contemplate the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਸਭੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਧਿਆਇ ਰਾਮਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh binasai sabh jhootth mere man dhiaae raamaa | rahaau |
lines.english: In an instant, all this false play shall perish; O my mind, meditate on the Lord. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਆਣੈ ਵਲਵੰਚ ਕਰਿ ਝੂਠੁ ਤਬ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਗੁ ਜਿਤੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jab aanai valavanch kar jhootth tab jaanai jag jiteea |1|
lines.english: When he brings home what he has acquired, by practicing deception and falsehood, he thinks that he has conquered the world. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਵੇਲਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਆਇ ਕੰਟਕੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਗ੍ਰਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: saa velaa chit na aavai jit aae kanttak kaal grasai |
lines.english: He does not think of that time, when Death, the Torturer, shall come and seize him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸੈ ॥੨॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis naanak le chhaddaae jis kirapaa kar hiradai vasai |2|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord saves that one, within whose heart the Lord, in His Kind Mercy, dwells. ||2||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਕ ਨੂਰ ਕਰਦੰ ਆਲਮ ਦੁਨੀਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: khaak noor karadan aalam duneeae |
lines.english: The Lord infused His Light into the dust, and created the world, the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 5 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fifth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਦੇ ਚਸਮ ਦੀਦੰ ਫਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bande chasam deedan fanaae |
lines.english: O human being, whatever you can see with your eyes, shall perish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਮਾਨ ਜਿਮੀ ਦਰਖਤ ਆਬ ਪੈਦਾਇਸਿ ਖੁਦਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: asamaan jimee darakhat aab paidaaeis khudaae |1|
lines.english: The sky, the earth, the trees, and the water - all are the Creation of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨਂ‍ੀਆ ਮੁਰਦਾਰ ਖੁਰਦਨੀ ਗਾਫਲ ਹਵਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dunaneea muradaar khuradanee gaafal havaae | rahaau |
lines.english: The world eats dead carcasses, living by neglect and greed. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਲ ਕਬਜ ਕਬਜਾ ਕਾਦਰੋ ਦੋਜਕ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dil kabaj kabajaa kaadaro dojak sajaae |2|
lines.english: So control your urges, or else you will be seized by the Lord, and thrown into the tortures of hell. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੈਬਾਨ ਹੈਵਾਨ ਹਰਾਮ ਕੁਸਤਨੀ ਮੁਰਦਾਰ ਬਖੋਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gaibaan haivaan haraam kusatanee muradaar bakhoraae |
lines.english: Like a goblin, or a beast, they kill and eat the forbidden carcasses of meat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਲੀ ਨਿਆਮਤਿ ਬਿਰਾਦਰਾ ਦਰਬਾਰ ਮਿਲਕ ਖਾਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: valee niaamat biraadaraa darabaar milak khaanaae |
lines.english: Your benefactors, presents, companions, courts, lands and homes

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਅਜਰਾਈਲੁ ਬਸਤਨੀ ਤਬ ਚਿ ਕਾਰੇ ਬਿਦਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jab ajaraaeel basatanee tab chi kaare bidaae |3|
lines.english: - when Azraa-eel, the Messenger of Death seizes you, what good will these be to you then? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਵਾਲ ਮਾਲੂਮੁ ਕਰਦੰ ਪਾਕ ਅਲਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: havaal maaloom karadan paak alaah |
lines.english: The Pure Lord God knows your condition.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਗੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਪੇਸਿ ਦਰਵੇਸ ਬੰਦਾਹ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: bugo naanak aradaas pes daraves bandaah |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, recite your prayer to the holy people. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin doojaa naahee koe |
lines.english: There is no other than You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: tilang ghar 2 mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Tilang, Second House, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਜੋਰੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਮਨਿ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: teraa jor teree man ttek |
lines.english: You are the strength, and You are the support of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: too karataar kareh so hoe |
lines.english: You are the Creator; whatever You do, that alone happens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ਤੇਰਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teree ttek teraa aadhaar | rahaau |
lines.english: You are our support, You are our sustainer. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa jap naanak ek |1|
lines.english: Forever and ever, meditate, O Nanak, on the One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aoopar paarabraham daataar |
lines.english: The Great Giver is the Supreme Lord God over all.
